coarse_alignment_reason: Whole-poem fallback because Chinese and English stanza structures do not align safely.
chinese_text:
子之還兮，遭我乎峱之閒兮。並驅從兩肩兮，揖我謂我儇兮。
子之茂兮，遭我乎峱之道兮。並驅從兩牡兮，揖我謂我好兮。
子之昌兮，遭我乎峱之陽兮。並驅從兩狼兮，揖我謂我臧兮。
translation_text:
1 How agile you are !
You met me in the neighbourhood of Naou,
And we pursued together two boars of three years.
You bowed to me, and said that I was active.
